memoryArtifacts.headline: Park Hall
memoryArtifacts.description: Descent: Sir John Botetourt, kt. sold 1373 to Sir Henry de Arden (d. c.1400), kt.; to son, Sir Ralph Arden (d. 1420), kt.; to son, Robert de Arden (d. 1452); to son, Walter Arden (d. 1502); to son, Sir John Arden (d. 1526), kt.; to son, Thomas Arden (d. 1563); to grandson, Edward Arden (d. 1583); forfeited to Crown and granted 1586 to Edward Darcy but in 1609 surrendered and returned to Robert Arden (d. 1635); to grandson, Robert Arden (d. 1643); to four sisters, from whom it was bought up by the husband of Godith Arden, Sir Herbert Price (fl. 1664); to son, John Price (fl. 1704); sold 1704 to John Bridgeman of Castle Bromwich Hall, with which it descended thereafter.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Arden I於1421年8月14日出生在英國瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾時，他的父親Ralph de Arden48歲，母親Sibel De Belgrave46歲。他於1440年與Elizabeth de Clodshale在英國瓦維其可爾薩爾特利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1452年8月12日在英國瓦維其可爾享年30歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Arden I于1421年8月14日出生在英国瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾时，他的父亲Ralph de Arden48岁，母亲Sibel De Belgrave46岁。他于1440年与Elizabeth de Clodshale在英国瓦維其可爾薩爾特利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1452年8月12日在英国瓦維其可爾享年30岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Arden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, either from the district of Arden in Warwickshire or from Arden in Bredbury (Cheshire). The first placename is thought to be derived from a Celtic word meaning ‘high place’, cognate with Ardennes, the name of a forested region on the borders between northeastern France and eastern Belgium. The second derives from Old English hēah ‘high’ + worthign ‘enclosed settlement’.

variants.name: Harden
meanings: English: variant of Arden with prosthetic H-.

English: habitational name, either from Haredene Wood in East Tisbury (Wiltshire), or from Haredon (in Ugborough, Devon). The first placename probably derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ + denu ‘valley’. The second is from Old English hara + dūn ‘hare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Arden I was born on 14 August 1421, in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, his father, Ralph de Arden, was 48 and his mother, Sibel De Belgrave, was 46. He married Elizabeth de Clodshale in 1440, in Saltley, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 August 1452, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Arden I est né le 14 août 1421, à Parkhall, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Arden, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Sibel De Belgrave, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Clodshale en 1440, à Saltley, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 août 1452, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Arden I am 14. August 1421 in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Arden 48 und seine Mutter Sibel De Belgrave 46. Er hat 1440 in Saltley, Warwickshire, England Elizabeth de Clodshale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. August 1452 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Warwickshire, England und wurde in Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Arden I è nato il il 14 agosto 1421 nel Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Arden, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Sibel De Belgrave, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Clodshale nel 1440, nel Saltley, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 agosto 1452, nel Warwickshire, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Warwickshire, England.

ja.Parkhall, Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイアパークハル
ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Arden Iが1421年8月14日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアパークハルで生まれた時，父Ralph de Ardenは48歳，母Sibel De Belgraveは46歳であった。1440年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアサルトリーでElizabeth de Clodshaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1452年8月12日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで30歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Arden I(이)가 1421년 8월 14일 영국 워윅실르 박홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Arden(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibel De Belgrave(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1440년 영국 워윅실르 살틀리에서 Elizabeth de Clodshale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년 8월 12일 영국 워윅실르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르에 묻혔다.

pt.14 August 1421–12 August 1452: 14 de agosto de 1421–12 de agosto de 1452
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Arden I nasceu em 14 de agosto de 1421, em Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Arden, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Sibel De Belgrave, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Clodshale em 1440, em Saltley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1452, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Arden I родился 14 августа 1421 г. в местности пархолл, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Arden было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibel De Belgrave, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Clodshale в 1440 г. в местности салтли, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 августа 1452 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности варвиккшир, Англия.

es.14 August 1421–12 August 1452: 14 de agosto de 1421–12 de agosto de 1452
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Arden I nació el 14 de agosto de 1421, en Parkhall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Arden, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Sibel De Belgrave, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Clodshale en 1440, en Saltley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1452, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
